testcase.name: loginBadCredentials_returns400
testcase.system-out:
20:30:06.326 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.coresystem.coresystembackend.CoresystembackendApplication for test class com.coresystem.coresystembackend.AuthLoginIntegrationTest 20:30:06.405 [main] INFO org.springframework.boot.test.context.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper -- Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.coresystem.coresystembackend.CoresystembackendApplication for test class com.coresystem.coresystembackend.AuthLoginIntegrationTest

testcase.name: loginSuccess_returnsJwtResponse

testcase.name: loginException_returns401
